title: Novartis India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Novartis India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
